vocab.meaning: một luồng gió mới (người có cách tiếp cận mới mẻ, thú vị)
vocab.example: His unconventional teaching methods were a breath of fresh air compared to the dry, textbook-heavy style of other instructors.

vocab.meaning: khơi dậy niềm đam mê/hứng thú vào việc gì
vocab.example: It was my physics teacher who truly sparked an interest in astrophysics, a field I had previously found intimidating.

vocab.meaning: nâng đỡ, che chở và dìu dắt ai đó
vocab.example: Mr. Harrison took me under his wing during my senior year, mentoring me through the difficult university application process.

vocab.word: set someone on the right path
vocab.meaning: đưa ai đó đi đúng hướng/con đường đúng đắn
vocab.example: I was quite a lost student, but her firm yet kind guidance really set me on the right path academically.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng tầm hiểu biết/nhãn quan của ai đó
vocab.example: He didn't just teach us facts; he challenged us to think critically and broadened our horizons regarding global issues.

vocab.meaning: một người xuất sắc, đáng ngưỡng mộ (về cả kỹ năng và tính cách)
vocab.example: My literature professor was a class act—always poised, incredibly articulate, and profoundly fair to every student.

vocab.meaning: vun đắp/truyền sự tự tin cho ai đó
vocab.example: She had a remarkable knack for instilling confidence in even the most soft-spoken students during public speaking classes.

vocab.meaning: rất tôn trọng và quý mến ai đó
vocab.example: To this day, I still hold my old math teacher in high esteem for his patience and unwavering belief in my potential.

vocab.meaning: tạo ra nhiều cơ hội mới cho ai đó
vocab.example: By encouraging me to enter the national debate competition, he effectively opened doors for my future legal career.

vocab.meaning: có ích/giúp ích rất nhiều cho ai đó trong tương lai
vocab.example: The rigorous work ethic my favorite teacher demanded has stood me in good stead throughout my professional life.
